scripts.test:e2e: cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm playwright npx playwright test
scripts.save: cd e2e/authorizedUser && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.load: cd e2e/authorizedUser && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:unauth: cd e2e/unauthorizedUser && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:unauth: cd e2e/unauthorizedUser && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:user: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir user && cd user && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:website-creator: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir websiteCreator && cd webCreator && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:system-admin: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir systemAdmin && cd systemAdmin && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:academic-admin: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir academicAdmin && cd academicAdmin && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:content-creator: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir contentCreator && cd contentCreator && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:content-editor: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir contentEditor && cd contentEditor && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.save:faculty: cd e2e/authorizedUser && mkdir faculty && cd faculty && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --save-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:user: cd e2e/authorizedUser/user && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:website-creator: cd e2e/authorizedUser/websiteCreator && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:system-admin: cd e2e/authorizedUser/systemAdmin && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:content-creator: cd e2e/authorizedUser/contentCreator && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:content-editor: cd e2e/authorizedUser/contentEditor && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
scripts.load:faculty: cd e2e/authorizedUser/faculty && npx playwright codegen localhost:3000 --load-storage=auth.json
